public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as public herald.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In Roaz, that reads as someone precise, disciplined, and legality-first, with little patience for disorder, and the habits of a public herald still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of public herald in and around Iron Accord, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Iron Accord workable through the obligations of public herald while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Roaz.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Iron Accord, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of public herald visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Veyra Steelmarch needs help with a problem in Iron Accord that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Veyra Steelmarch can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Veyra Steelmarch carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Iron Accord: the part of Iron Accord where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
